positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical mandala-style arrangement featuring interwoven cosmic elements and flora. The central motif is a glowing nebula swirl connecting gracefully with detailed, stylized monstera leaves and flowing lavender stems. Utilize deep midnight blues, vibrant teal, electric violet, and contrasting matte gold accents. The style should resemble elegant screen printing and tattoo art, with crisp outlines, flat fields of color, and strong graphic contrast. Composition must be centered, highly detailed, and optimized for repeating apparel prints, achieving a clean, powerful silhouette. Minimal gradient usage, maximum graphic punch.
negative: blurry, low detail, noise, smudge, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logos, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, cartoon, photograph, photorealism, gradient wash, messy, messy edges
